findings.headline: Concept B wins on consideration metrics; long-run hero assets need a rotation schedule.

recommendations.title: Scale concept B into always-on with guardrails
recommendations.rationale: Lift significant in two geos; watch frequency caps to avoid saturation.

evidence: Geo holdout test n=4 regions, 6-week read.

findings.headline: Checkout step shows the largest drop-off; mobile landing LCP regressed on two key templates.

recommendations.title: Simplify checkout step validation on mobile
recommendations.rationale: 62% of exits occur on payment details with validation errors disproportionately on mobile Safari.

evidence: Funnel visualization: step 3 → 4 largest relative loss.

findings.headline: Search captures high-intent demand; impression share losses on core brand terms need budget or bid attention.

recommendations.title: Defend core brand terms before competitor conquest ramps
recommendations.rationale: IS dropped 5pts while CPC on generics rose; brand terms still highest ROAS.

recommendations.title: refresh top-fatigued creatives in retargeting
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate hygiene check: different channel but same theme as social — merge test.

evidence: Search query report: +18% brand term volume WoW.

findings.headline: Social spend is efficient on prospecting but retargeting CPMs are creeping up week over week.

recommendations.title: Refresh top-fatigued creatives in retargeting
recommendations.rationale: Three static assets account for 45% of impressions and show a 19% drop in CTR vs account average.

recommendations.title: Re-allocate 10% budget to best-performing prospecting ad sets
recommendations.rationale: Two ad sets beat CPA target by 14% with room to scale.

evidence: Retargeting CPM +11% WoW while prospecting CPM flat.
Creative report: top 3 assets 42 days old.
findings.raw_notes: Assume last-click attribution in mock data; incrementality not modeled.

merged_recommendations.title: Defend core brand terms before competitor conquest ramps
merged_recommendations.rationale: IS dropped 5pts while CPC on generics rose; brand terms still highest ROAS.

merged_recommendations.title: refresh top-fatigued creatives in retargeting
merged_recommendations.rationale:
Duplicate hygiene check: different channel but same theme as social — merge test.

_(Also noted by **paid_social**):_ Three static assets account for 45% of impressions and show a 19% drop in CTR vs account average.

merged_recommendations.title: Simplify checkout step validation on mobile
merged_recommendations.rationale: 62% of exits occur on payment details with validation errors disproportionately on mobile Safari.

merged_recommendations.title: Re-allocate 10% budget to best-performing prospecting ad sets
merged_recommendations.rationale: Two ad sets beat CPA target by 14% with room to scale.

merged_recommendations.title: Scale concept B into always-on with guardrails
merged_recommendations.rationale: Lift significant in two geos; watch frequency caps to avoid saturation.

executive_bullets: **creative**: Concept B wins on consideration metrics; long-run hero assets need a rotation schedule.
**funnel**: Checkout step shows the largest drop-off; mobile landing LCP regressed on two key templates.
**paid_search**: Search captures high-intent demand; impression share losses on core brand terms need budget or bid attention.
**paid_social**: Social spend is efficient on prospecting but retargeting CPMs are creeping up week over week.
